item.label: Download media
item.visible: String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,video) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,set) | String.StartsWith(ListItem.Path,plugin://plugin.video.jellyfin)

extension.description: Bypass Android TV USB restrictions by downloading media natively via Kodi.
